channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI and the Pope
item.description: The church’s document on AI recognizes technology as a wonderful aspect of humanity, but cautions that 'technology is never neutral.'

item.title: The Trump Administration Proposes A Big Expansion Of Hunting Rights On Public Lands
item.description: The proposed rule change follows an order from Secretary of the Interior Doug Burgum, which found that "public and federally managed lands should be o...

item.title: KBJ Says It’s ‘A Legitimate Question’ Whether Judges Should Defy Emergency SCOTUS Orders
item.description: Jackson's comments are especially insane given that there is nothing new about lower courts being bound by the Supreme Court's guidance.

item.title: Bank Regulators Finally Back Off ‘Reputational Risk’ Overreach
item.description: Serving businesses disfavored by bureaucrats should never have been considered a financial risk.
